TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-palamal_kaniw

S.FORM: kami u Sakizaya a tamdaw i ayaw nu cacay a lasubu izaw ku tulu a bataan a mihcaan nu madebekay kami a mapatay a tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們撒奇萊雅族在一百三十年前被消滅。
We Sakizaya was extinct one hundred and thirty years ago.

S.FORM: nayay tu ku ngangan i tini i hekal.
S.TRANSL: 對外名字也不見了。
The name disappeared to the outside (world).

S.FORM: saka tiza sa a mikapi i hiya i nu pangcahan ku nikauzip aca nu niyam.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們就屈身於阿美族部落生存。
So we lived under Amis with grievance.

S.FORM: saka u zuma tu haw kuni u mikuwanay tuyni a kanatal saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以別人管理這個島了。
So other people took over this island.

S.FORM: palekalen nu niza haw kuni u binacadan.
S.TRANSL: 他（政府）設立原住民。
(The government) established (titles for) indigenous people.

S.FORM: amin haw nu kasizumazuma tuyni u yuancumin sananay i Taiwan.
S.TRANSL: 所有在台灣所謂的原住民。
All are the so-called indigenous people in Taiwan.

S.FORM: saka kami saka mulekal tu kami.
S.TRANSL: 我們就成立了（撒奇萊雅族）。
Therefore we were set up.

S.FORM: saupuupusa kami malingatu.
S.TRANSL: 我們開始集合。
We started to gather.

S.FORM: kina pinaay haw a a saupu a masasusuwal tu pakainiay haw kami nu sakizaya a kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們多次的集合與討論有關撒奇萊雅族的事情。
We gathered many times and discussed things about Sakizaya.

S.FORM: saka malaheci niyam.
S.TRANSL: 所以有了成果。
So, there were some achievements.

S.FORM: tya mapacudad.
S.TRANSL: (我們)就登記。
Then (we) register.

S.FORM: hepi mapacudad i tini i i yuanminhuei i tini sakakaay joseiin sananay.
S.TRANSL: 就在行政院原民會登記。
(We) registered as Council of Indigenous Peoples, Executive Yuan.

S.FORM: saka na mahica saka kapah tu.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣；就很好。
That’s it; that’s good.

S.FORM: kyu mapatizeng kami i Taiwan i mahini tu sabaw tulu a minzok sananay a nikauzip.
S.TRANSL: 所以我們在台灣就成了所謂的第十三族了。
So we were titled as the thirteenth indigenous people in Taiwan.

S.FORM: saka mutizeng tu singangan tu kita.
S.TRANSL: 我們成立了，也有名字了。
(We) were set up and had our name.

S.FORM: saka mi saka limulak amin ku baluzu’.
S.TRANSL: 因此我們都很高興。
Therefore we were very happy.

S.FORM: kakilukilul sa tu amin haw a manamuh.
S.TRANSL: 大家都跟著很高興。
We were very happy.

S.FORM: masaupu matatengitengil.
S.TRANSL: 大家集合開會。
We gathered and had a meeting.

S.FORM: saka sayaway a mazateng niyam uyni tu u palamal sananay a lisin haw nuyni u hiya nuyni u Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 我們最先想到的是撒奇萊雅的火神祭典。
What we firstly thought of was the fire ceremony of Sakizaya.

S.FORM: anu izaw henay ku palamalay i tini i Taiwan haw u nuni u yuancumin sananay sa u Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 在台灣的原住民，如果有火神祭的話，就是撒奇萊雅族。
If the indigenous people in Taiwan have fire ceremony, it is Sakizaya (that has it).

S.FORM: u Sakizaya henay a tamdaw sa palamalay.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅就是點火的人。
Sakizaya (means) the people who light a fire.

S.FORM: sa u mahizaay tu.
S.TRANSL: 就是這樣。
That’s it.

S.FORM: zay han uyni u lamal haw ku saka tebek a mapatay.
S.TRANSL: (撒奇萊雅)因為火而毀滅。
(Sakizaya) was destroyed because of fire.

S.FORM: aynay’ ku ngangan nu sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅就沒有名字。
Sakizaya did not have its name.

S.FORM: nu nituduhan haw nu.
S.TRANSL: 燒了。
(It) burned.

S.FORM: nika balcawaw atu ni u gungdong hananay a hulam nu nituduhan sa ku niyazu’.
S.TRANSL: 燒毀部落裡從廣東來的外省人。
Those who burned the tribe were the Mainland Chinese from Guangdong.

S.FORM: kyu mabulaw talacu wa kuni u sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 於是撒奇萊雅人就搬家了。
So Sakizaya moved away.

S.FORM: saka cacay a mihca ayza haw izaw tu haw kuni ka palamal nu Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: (正名)一年後，才有火神祭。
After one year (that we proclaimed our identity), there is a fire ceremony.

S.FORM: saka u mapatayay i tawya henay saka katu ud ku mapatayay a nu Sakizaya a nu uyni da da haw u talaayaway ku uzip u sEnEng saka makatulu a malebut.
S.TRANSL: 當時撒奇萊雅有許多人死亡，光年輕人就有3000人。
There were many casualties of Sakizaya at that time, up to three thousand young people.

S.FORM: makatukuh lima a malebut ku mapatayay.
S.TRANSL: 而死亡總數到達5000人。
And the number of dead people amounted to five thousand people

S.FORM: sa i tawya haw nika u kamu tu a makatukuh i tini ya wawa saka malalum ku baluzu’ isaw a misimsim sa kyu.
S.TRANSL: 說到這裡、想到這裡，孩子就傷心。
When I mentioned and thought of this, children could not help but be sad.

S.FORM: saice langsa kami yu mahini haw a patizeng haw tuni u Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 因為這樣，我們就很努力成立撒奇萊雅族。
Because of this, we worked hard to establish Sakizaya.

S.FORM: saka uyni tabakiay a lisin nu Sakizaya uyni tu palamal sananay.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅最大的祭典就是火神祭。
The biggest ceremony of Sakizaya is the fire ceremony.

S.FORM: u pizateng tu kuyni haw tunu lalum tu haw tu.
S.TRANSL: 想到令人傷心的事。
(I) thought of the sad things.

S.FORM: u u kinEn haw tu mapatayay amin a tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 紀念所有死掉的人。
(It) commemorated the dead.

S.FORM: saka ina kawaw tuyni u mis palamal sananay sa.
S.TRANSL: 這個所謂的火神祭。
This is what we called fire ceremony.

S.FORM: tatenga’ saayaway izaw tu kuyni haw sitatudung ay a babalaki u mikeliday.
S.TRANSL: 有一位老人家負責當帶領。
There was an old man, who took the responsibility and was a leader.

S.FORM: anu malingatu tu a misalamal.
S.TRANSL: (他)開始點火。
(He) started to light a fire.

S.FORM: saka u babalaki tu saka cinza ku mibetikay.
S.TRANSL: 老人家是用手沾酒再灑的人。
The elder man was the one who dipped wine with his finger and sprayed.

S.FORM: tya a misasuwal cinza haw tu ca’ay kamelaw a dietu.
S.TRANSL: 然後就跟看不見的(鬼神)講話。
Then (he) talked to the spirits, which were unseen.

S.FORM: tya kilul sa tu uyni tu u mipadangay.
S.TRANSL: 接著的是幫忙的人。
Next was the one who helped.

S.FORM: haw tuyni u mikeliday a mibetik.
S.TRANSL: 帶領的人用手沾酒再灑。
The leader was the one who dipped wine with his finger and sprayed.

S.FORM: haw a mitaliyuk haw tuyni u nipipazengan tuyni u bila’ anu epah tu anu uyni tu u tunuz uyni tu haw u titi.
S.TRANSL: 繞著放東西的地方，（如）檳榔葉、酒、麻糬與肉類。
And (they) went around the place where they put things, (like) betel peppers, wine, rice cake and meat.

S.FORM: u sapibetik haw tuyni babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 用手沾酒的人，就是那個老人。
The old man was the one who dipped wine with his finger and sprayed.

S.FORM: saka malalum tu isaw ku nikabaluzu’.
S.TRANSL: 心裡很難過。
(I) was sad.

S.FORM: mahini mutizeng aca kami.
S.TRANSL: 我們成立了（撒奇萊雅族）。
We were set up (the Sakizaya).

S.FORM: mulkal aca kami haw u Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 我們撒奇萊雅活過來了。
We Sakizaya revived.

S.FORM: saka dipu ten kami sa haw ku nika u baluzu’.
S.TRANSL: （巫師）心想我們被保護。
(The wizard) thought we were protected.

S.FORM: mibetikay sitatudungay tuyni u hiya tuyni u kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 法師就是負責那件事情的人。
The wizard was the person who was responsible for the thing.

S.FORM: yu mudadiw tu silusa tu.
S.TRANSL: （他們）一邊唱一邊流淚。
(They) cried while they were singing.

S.FORM: malalum ku nikabaluzu’.
S.TRANSL: （我）心裡很難過。
(I) was very sad.

S.FORM: zay han i wata ku mawadaay a tamdaw a mapatay.
S.TRANSL: 因為令人驚訝的是不見的人都死了。
Because what was surprising was that the people who disappeared were dead.

S.FORM: tadahizaan kami a mibahbah palasawad haw ku nikauzip.
S.TRANSL: 我們就這樣被追趕，生命都丟了。
We were chased in that way and lost our lives.

S.FORM: sa haw ku nika babalaki kyu malalum tu kuyni u baluzu’.
S.TRANSL: 關於老人家以前的事情，（我們）很傷心。
We were sad about what happened to the senior citizens in the past.

S.FORM: na mahamin tu a mibetik kuheni saka.
S.TRANSL: 他們完成灑酒儀式。
They finished the wine-spraying ceremony.

S.FORM: saliyuk han kuyna nibetikan.
S.TRANSL: （他們）就繞著灑過的地方。
(They) went around the place where they sprayed wine.

S.FORM: haw a tunuz anu bila’ tu anu epah tu.
S.TRANSL: （那地方有）麻糬、檳榔葉、酒。
(The place had) rice cakes, betel pepper and wine.

S.FORM: saliyuksa a misasuwal mahamin kuyzaan a misasuwal tya miuhin tu haw kuyni u hiya.
S.TRANSL: 繞完了，話講完了，才跳舞。
After going around and finishing their speech, they danced

S.FORM: babalaki tatayna malcad u mapalaway.
S.TRANSL: 老婦人就跟著祭司跳舞。
The old women followed the wizard’s dancing.

S.FORM: saka uyza u namuh tu nuheni nu babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家很高興。
The senior citizens were happy.

S.FORM: i tini i nikapalaw i tini haw nipitaliyuk i tini haw nipatahkal tu ngiha’ saka.
S.TRANSL: 至於這個舞蹈，在繞的時候會發出聲音。
Speaking of the dancing, people would make sounds when they were going in a circle.

S.FORM: tatenga’ tu mazateng u saayaway a babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 的確令人想起最早的老人。
Indeed, it reminded of the first senior citizens.

S.FORM: nuyni Sakizaya uyni ci Kumud Pazik sananay.
S.TRANSL: 我就是Sakizaya的Kumud Pazik。
It is Kumud Pazik from Sakizaya.

S.FORM: u acawa niza haw ci Icep.
S.TRANSL: 他太太是Icep。
His wave is Icep.

S.FORM: na nu saya way kuheni a zakepen saka u sakakaay nu babalaki haw nu niyazu’ u mikeliday tu niyazu’.
S.TRANSL: 最先被抓到的人是部落最大的老人，是部落的領袖。
The first one to be arrested was the eldest person, the leader in the tribe.

S.FORM: u tatengilen nu Sakizaya a tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅族人都會請示（他們）。
Sakizaya people would consult with them.

S.FORM: sa ku hitay kyu patayen kina tatusaay a babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 所以這兩位老人就被軍人殺了。
So the two senior citizens were killed by the army.

S.FORM: uyni ci Kumud Pazik tuiya saka pacaiten nuheni kina babalaki tuyni haw ama.
S.TRANSL: Kumud Pazik那位老人被吊著。
The old man, Kumud Pazik, was hanged.

S.FORM: saka hacacay han nu heni a mikelit ku heci u nikauzip aca niza.
S.TRANSL: 所以在他還活著的時候，他們(軍人)就一塊一塊地切他的肉。
Therefore, they (the army) cut his fresh, when he was alive.

S.FORM: anu makamelaw kita haw i a hican nu mita a mimelaw.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們看到，我們怎會看下去呢？
If we saw it, how could we see that?

S.FORM: mahizaay simanta’ hananay haw a mipatay a mikelit ku heci.
S.TRANSL: （他）就活生生地被割肉到死。
(He) was cut to death while alive.

S.FORM: mamelaway nu mita u izang a amin mamelaway misasumanah sa tu mamin haw kuyni u.
S.TRANSL: 我們見到的都是血。
What we saw was blood.

S.FORM: u sasaan anu izang aca.
S.TRANSL: 地上都是血。
On the ground was blood.

S.FORM: tya uyni sa tu ya babalaki tu bayi hanay ci Icep tuyni saka micen nu heni i tini nipela’an tu tabakiay a kilang.
S.TRANSL: 至於Icep老婆婆，她被夾在剝半的大樹中。
Icep, the old woman, was placed in between the tree that was cut half.

S.FORM: saka mekmeken haw nuyni u nuyni u hita nuyni u gungdung sananay a hulam i tawya makatukuh haw i tini kapatayan ina babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 然後（她）被所謂的清兵踩到死。
Then (she) was stepped by the army of Qing Dynasty until she died.

S.FORM: saka mapatay kina babalaki tuyni sa a ma ngaleb kuyni sa a izang tahkal na i tini i sapad i labu ninasapad tuyni.
S.TRANSL: 有更多的血從木頭裡流出來。
More blood leaked from the wood.

S.FORM: saka na mahiza kyu ayza han tu sa anu milisin tu anu izaw tu haw ku canan a saupu sizikuc tu mamin ku Sakizaya tu zikuc.
S.TRANSL: 就因為這樣，現在有祭典的時候，所有撒奇萊雅人都會穿上（傳統）衣服。
Because of this, now Sakizaya people wear traditional clothes when the ceremony is held.

S.FORM: sa tu ina zikuc niyam saka uyni u kulyawlyaway atu sumanahay.
S.TRANSL: 我們（傳統）的衣服是紅色與黃色的。
Our (traditional) clothes are red and yellow.

S.FORM: ina sumanahay haw sa u izang.
S.TRANSL: 紅色的是血。
The red color is blood.

S.FORM: u pikinEn u pizateng na nu izang nu babalaki ni Kumud Pazik a ci Icep.
S.TRANSL: 是紀念Kumud Pazik與Icep老人家的血。
It is in remembrance of blood belonging to the senior citizens, Kumud Pazik and Icep.

S.FORM: uyni han tu ya kulyawliaway sananay saka u tudung haw nu takelal u cilal.
S.TRANSL: 所謂的土黃色是象徵光明、太陽。
The yellow color symbolizes brightness, the Sun.

S.FORM: makamelaway kita anini haw tu cilal.
S.TRANSL: 我們現在看到太陽了。
Now we see the sun.

S.FORM: takelal kita sa kya.
S.TRANSL: 我們很光明。
We are bright.

S.FORM: u namuh tu nu niyam kuyza.
S.TRANSL: 我們很高興，所以這樣說。
We are happy so we say (that).

S.FORM: saka mahizaay ku nika mikinEn haw tuyni u saka i tini haw nu Sakizayaan.
S.TRANSL: 那是要紀念有關撒奇萊雅的。
That commemorates (something) about Sakizaya.

S.FORM: saka uyni sa tu u palamal sananay.
S.TRANSL: 就是所謂的火神祭。
That is so called fire ceremony.

S.FORM: tatenga’ tu mapahzek tu kawaw tya mapalaw tu mamin haw kuyni u binawlan mamin.
S.TRANSL: 事情（火神祭）結束了，大家才一起跳舞。
After the ceremony is over, everyone then (starts to) dance.

S.FORM: u miuhin a makakitikiting ku babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人們手牽手跳舞。
The senior citizens held hand in hand and danced.

S.FORM: tya u zuma sa tu haw sa misaliyuk aca haw tina tatuduhan a lamal.
S.TRANSL: 還有的呢？（他們）繞著要燒的柴火。
What else? They went around the campfire that is going to burn.

S.FORM: kataling tu haw nuyni u kasui.
S.TRANSL: （他們）堆了柴火。
(They) piled up the firewood.

S.FORM: haw misakapukaputay zuluken amin haw nu babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家把（人）分成一組一組。
The senior citizens divided people into different groups.

S.FORM: a tayza a mibetik.
S.TRANSL: （他們）去那裡用手沾酒再灑。
(They) went there and dipped wine with their fingers and then sprayed.

S.FORM: tayza haw a padaesu tu uzip aca niza.
S.TRANSL: 祝福他身體健康。
(They) wish him to be healthy.

S.FORM: ya sazikuzay tu tya likat sa tu haw kuyni u sitatudungay a milikat.
S.TRANSL: 最後那個負責的人就去點火，就亮了。
Finally, the person, who took responsibility, lit and it became bright.

S.FORM: tuyni u lamal u matalingay ku kasui saka.
S.TRANSL: 柴火就是堆積的東西。
The pile-up was the firewood.

S.FORM: bang bang sa tu kuyni u lamal.
S.TRANSL: 火很旺。
The fire blazed.

S.FORM: takalaw haw kuyni u likat niza.
S.TRANSL: 燒的火很高。
The flames climbed high.

S.FORM: mapaedil mamin haw kuyni u mitaliyukay u muenengay.
S.TRANSL: 繞圈的人或坐著的人都蒙受那個光。
People who went around or sat bathed in the light.

S.FORM: mamin u babalaki a binaulan saka i tawya tu tya a misa patahkal tuyni u ngiha’.
S.TRANSL: 老人家跟其他人才發出聲音。
The senior citizens and other people then made sounds.

S.FORM: mulkalay tu kami.
S.TRANSL: 我們已經醒了。
We woke up.

S.FORM: i mahini saka nanay haw i palemeden kami diputeng kami.
S.TRANSL: 希望（我們）受到保護。
(We) hoped that we will be protected.

S.FORM: sa tu haw ku nika u namuh nu balucu’.
S.TRANSL: 心裡很高興。
(We) were very happy.

S.FORM: haw tu mihmihcaan saka anu katukuhan tu nu mihcaan.
S.TRANSL: 年年都這樣，但當一年到了。
Year after year, a year has come.

S.FORM: izaw tu haw ku nika paketun niyam anu i cuwa a demiad anu i cuwa a bulad.
S.TRANSL: 我們已經決定何月何日。
We had determined which day and which month.

S.FORM: saka u mahizaay kuyni u salamal sananay a kawaw nuyni u Sakizaya.
S.TRANSL: 撒奇萊雅火神祭的事情就是這樣。
This is so called fire ceremony of Sakizaya.

S.FORM: makatukuh ayza u sa kinatulu kya a kinasepat tu nu.
S.TRANSL: 到現在我們已經舉行三次了；要第四次了。
We had held three times until now; the fourth time is coming.

S.FORM: kina palamal sananay a kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 這個就是所謂的火神祭。
This is so called fire ceremony.

S.FORM: hatini tu ku kamu aku.
S.TRANSL: 我話至此。
Here were my words.
